The Villa

Where the island begins at your door

Villa Les Basses sits directly on the white sands of Anse de Lorient — one of St. Barthélemy's most celebrated bays. Conceived as a contemporary expression of Caribbean luxury, this single-level beachfront residence places your family moments from the water's edge, with the rhythmic sound of the sea as your constant companion.

From the great room, sliding glass doors dissolve the boundary between interior and exterior, drawing in the ocean breeze and framing uninterrupted views across Lorient Bay to the silhouettes of Île Toc Vers, Île Frégate, and Île Bonhomme on the horizon.

The villa's two king suites are positioned symmetrically on either flank of the great room, ensuring complete privacy between rooms — an arrangement that works equally well for a couple with older children or two families sharing the property.

Lorient's reef-protected bay provides calm, swimmable water ideal for families, while a dedicated swimming area has been created directly below the villa's beach gate. The pool features both a shallow end and a deep end — suited to all ages.

Villa Les Basses is ideally suited for families with children aged 8 and older. Children must be capable swimmers. The reef-protected bay at Lorient creates some of the island's calmest waters, and the private beach gate, dedicated ocean swimming area, and pool shallow end ensure a safe environment throughout. Lorient is also a lively local surfing spot — older children will find the offshore breaks endlessly entertaining from the terrace.

Villa Les Basses — Lorient Beach, St. Barthélemy

Dedicated Staff

Every detail, attended to

Villa Les Basses is offered with a full complement of in-residence staff. From the moment you wake until the last plate is cleared, your household runs seamlessly in the background.

Culinary Services
Full-Time
Private Chef
A dedicated chef manages all culinary planning for your stay — from leisurely breakfasts to candlelit terrace dinners. Menus are tailored to your family's preferences and dietary requirements. Pre-arrival menu consultations are available through our concierge.
Grocery and ingredient costs invoiced separately. Pre-stocking available prior to arrival.
Personal Service
Full-Time
Butler
Your butler is the single point of contact for everything that makes a stay truly effortless — beach setup, restaurant reservations, yacht charters, and ground transportation. Discreet, professional, and anticipatory by nature.
Property Care
Daily
Housekeeping
The villa is serviced daily, Monday through Saturday. Rooms are refreshed, linens are crisp, and common areas are immaculate throughout your stay. Cleaning is coordinated around your schedule by your butler.
Service available Monday to Saturday. Sundays excluded.
Interior

Considered spaces,
Caribbean light

The great room is the villa's social core — a generously proportioned open-plan space where living, dining, and kitchen merge. Sliding glass doors span the full oceanfront wall, opening entirely to the covered terrace. Rattan sofas face the sea; an indoor dining table accommodates up to six.

  • Open-plan great room with full ocean-facing glass
  • Modern kitchen in white with black marble countertops
  • Fully equipped for gourmet meal preparation
  • Nespresso, ice maker, blender, juicer included
  • Indoor dining for up to 6 guests
  • Bose/Sonos surround sound system
  • U.S. satellite TV with streaming
  • iPad villa controller & high-speed Wi-Fi

Bedroom Suites
Both king suites are architecturally identical, positioned on either side of the great room for complete privacy. Each opens directly to the terrace and ocean.

  • King-sized bed with premium linens
  • Private dressing room
  • Ensuite bathroom with double vanity
  • Spacious walk-in shower
  • Individual air-conditioning and ceiling fan
  • Direct terrace access with ocean views
  • In-room safe
  • Smart TV — satellite and streaming

The days are yours — morning pastries from the bakery across the street, hours in the sea or by the pool, a private chef's dinner as the stars come out over the bay. Lorient does not demand anything of you. It simply offers everything.

Six Star Travel & Cruise  ·  Villa Les Basses, St. Barthélemy
Outdoor Living

The terrace, the pool,
and the sea beyond

Outdoor living is at the centre of the Villa Les Basses experience. The covered terrace runs the full width of the oceanside elevation — fitted with an alfresco dining table for six, a cocktail lounge, and unobstructed views across the bay. From here, afternoons dissolve into golden evenings as the sun drops behind the western headland.

The private pool occupies the central terrace level, with shallow and deep sections. A gate below the pool deck opens directly onto the beach. The villa's dedicated ocean swimming area is ideal for children and confident swimmers alike.

  • Full-width covered terrace with ocean views
  • Alfresco dining table for 6 on the terrace
  • Sunset cocktail lounge area
  • Private pool with shallow and deep ends
  • Multiple sun loungers and terrace seating
  • Gas grill for outdoor cooking
  • Private gated beach access — steps to the sand
  • Dedicated swimming area in the ocean
  • Direct frontage on Anse de Lorient
  • Parking for three vehicles

Location

Lorient Beach —
perfectly positioned

Lorient occupies a privileged position on St. Barthélemy's north coast — close enough to St-Jean for dining and provisioning, quiet enough to feel entirely removed. The bakery is across the street. The rest of the island unfolds in minutes.

Steps
Anse de Lorient
The villa's own beach. Reef-protected, calm, and largely local — excellent swimming, snorkelling, and a surfing break just offshore.
1 min
Lorient Village
A bakery directly across the street. Grocery store one minute on foot — ideal for replenishing between chef-prepared meals.
5 min
St-Jean
The island's primary village. Boutique shopping, acclaimed restaurants, Eden Rock hotel, and one of St. Barts' most photogenic beaches.
5 min
Marigot Bay
Five minutes east — a quieter, coconut grove-fringed strip ideal for a peaceful afternoon away from the terrace.
10 min
Gustavia Harbour
The island's capital and marina. Luxury retail, waterfront restaurants, and departure point for yacht charters.
~15 min
Flamands & Colombier
Flamands: wide blonde sand, ideal for families. Colombier: accessible only by foot or boat — one of the Caribbean's most extraordinary coves.
Practical Details

Booking & conditions

  • Minimum Stay: 7 nights standard. 5 nights on request. 14 nights during festive season.
  • Rates: On application. Subject to 5% tourism tax and 10–11% service charge. Festive at full-occupancy rate.
  • Capacity: 4 guests maximum — 2 per bedroom. Children 8 years and older only.
  • Children: Must be capable swimmers. Parental supervision required near beach and pool at all times.
  • Chef Services: Full-time chef included. Grocery and ingredient costs invoiced separately. Pre-arrival menu consultation and grocery pre-stocking available.
  • Housekeeping: Daily Monday through Saturday. Sundays are staff rest day.
  • Pets: Not permitted.
  • Currency: Rates quoted in USD. Additional services billed separately.
